_comment: Single source of truth for SGCC JIS G 3302 constants used by optimize_hardening*.py, bayesian_reidentification.py, yld2000_param_sensitivity.py, generate_fig_yld2000_multidir.py, barlat_yld2000.py. Units: MPa, mm, tonne/mm^3.

voce_isotropic_0deg.source: Voce fit of the 0-deg pooled true stress - plastic strain curve (data_processing.py).

r_values_multizone_DIC.source: Multi-zone DIC extraction with weighted pooling over 3 specimens per direction (compute_anisotropy.m).

offset_yield_pooled_MPa.source: Fallback literal values; authoritative copy lives in output/offset_yield_pooled.json.
